query:
INSERT INTO instances (
			id,
			path,
			applied_content_set_id,
			install_stage,
			launcher_feature_version,
			update_channel,
			name,
			icon_path,
			created,
			modified,
			last_played,
			submitted_time_played,
			recent_time_played
		)
		VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
